context: Tests whether the agent correctly applies deduplication strategies (exact match, semantic overlap, corroboration, conflict), ranks findings by severity×confidence×verification_support, suppresses style/linter-covered findings, retains suppressed findings in data, and adds the required synthesis metadata fields.

checklist.name: Cache key findings merged
checklist.description: fe-001, fe-002, and ch-001 are merged into a single finding (or cluster) in merged_findings.json — not surfaced as three separate independent findings

checklist.name: Corroborated_by populated
checklist.description: The merged cache key finding has corroborated_by listing at least two sources (fresh_eyes and challenger, or equivalent)

checklist.name: Conflict detected for stack trace
checklist.description: fe-003 and ch-002 are identified as conflicting (contested_by populated) since one flags the stack trace as dangerous and the other refutes it as safe

checklist.name: Contested finding surfaced
checklist.description: The contested stack trace finding is surfaced (not suppressed) despite the conflict, and its action is set to 'discuss' (or equivalent) or requires_human is set to true

checklist.name: Style finding suppressed
checklist.description: fe-004 (variable naming / non-descriptive variable name) is suppressed with a suppression_reason referencing linter coverage or style-only finding

checklist.name: Suppressed findings retained
checklist.description: merged_findings.json includes suppressed findings (suppressed: true) with suppression_reason populated — they are not omitted from the output

checklist.name: Novel finding included
checklist.description: ch-003 (TTL=0 / never expires) is included as a surfaced finding since it is novel and meets the evidence threshold

checklist.name: Ranking by score formula
checklist.description: synthesis_report.md documents a ranking score for each surfaced finding calculated using severity × confidence × verification_support (or an equivalent multiplicative formula)

checklist.name: Cache key finding ranked first
checklist.description: The merged cache key finding (severity 3 × confidence 3 × verification_support 2 = 18) ranks highest among surfaced findings

checklist.name: merged_confidence field present
checklist.description: Every finding in merged_findings.json includes a merged_confidence field set to high, medium, or low

checklist.name: Deduplication strategy named
checklist.description: synthesis_report.md names the deduplication strategy applied to each cluster (exact match, semantic overlap, corroboration, or conflict) — not just the result

checklist.name: No arbitrary cap
checklist.description: The output does NOT arbitrarily limit findings to a fixed count (e.g. 'top 3 findings') — all findings clearing the evidence threshold are surfaced
